hooks.command: if [ -f AGENTS.md ]; then if [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"},"systemMessage":"startup order: read AGENTS.md first, then notes/README.md, then notes/reference/index.md, then only the task-relevant reference docs and durable memory notes, then graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md, and only after that open raw code files. If you learn something durable, update the matching note under notes/ before you finish."}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"},"systemMessage":"startup order: read AGENTS.md first, then notes/README.md, then notes/reference/index.md, then only the task-relevant reference docs and durable memory notes, and only after that open raw code files. Build the graph if you need architecture context, and update notes/ when the task leaves durable memory behind."}'; fi; else true; fi
